title: Add a structured-logging middleware to each of four independent services
goal: The fixture monorepo has four independent services under services/{a,b,c,d}. For each, add a structured-logging middleware that emits one log line per request with fields: ts, method, path, status, duration_ms, service. Include a unit test per service.

successCriteria.expectation: each service emits the required fields on a sample request

notes: Designed to surface multi-agent's fan-out advantage on truly-independent subtasks (the Google Research result, spec §10). Expect multi-agent C3/C4 to win on wall-clock at equal total tokens — but watch for context drift across the four parallel sub-agents on the shared logging schema.
